headline: Cartography Biosciences Advances Strategic Oncology Collaboration with Gilead’s First Option Target Exercise
summary: SOUTH SAN FRANCISCO, Calif., April 09, 2026--Cartography Biosciences, Inc., a clinical-stage biotechnology company advancing a differentiated pipeline of antibody-based cancer therapies, today announced that Gilead Sciences, Inc. has exercised the first of its options to exclusively license a novel oncology target discovered and validated through Cartography’s proprietary ATLAS and SUMMIT platforms arising out of the parties’ collaboration.

headline: Kymera Therapeutics Announces Gilead Sciences’ Option Exercise to License KT-200, Oral CDK2 Molecular Glue Degrader Development Candidate
summary: KT-200 is a first-in-class, oral CDK2 molecular glue degrader development candidate Option exercise of KT-200 triggers a $45 million milestone payment to Kymera from Gilead Sciences WATERTOWN, Mass., April 09, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Kymera Therapeutics, Inc.
